help_page.title: Help & Guide
help_page.intro: A quick guide to using Butcher Cashier.

sections.heading: Dashboard
sections.body: See today's order count, current low-stock alerts, how many products you're tracking, and a notification when orders have been pending longer than the alert threshold set in Admin.

sections.heading: New Order
sections.body: Pick a product, enter the weight in kg, and add it to the cart — or scan a barcode to add it instantly. Link the order to a customer, and the total updates live; the server checks stock automatically before saving.

sections.heading: Barcode scanning
sections.body: Plug in any USB or Bluetooth barcode scanner — it works like a keyboard, no setup needed. Give each product a barcode in Inventory, then click the barcode field on New Order and scan; the matching product is added automatically.

sections.heading: Order Inbox
sections.body: Log an order that came in by phone or social media DM: pick the products, note the delivery address, and save it as a draft. Confirm it from Orders once it's ready to fulfill.

sections.heading: Orders
sections.body: View every past order and its total, including drafts saved from the Inbox and their source (walk-in, phone, social, WhatsApp).

sections.heading: Customers
sections.body: Keep a record of each customer's name, phone, address, and notes, along with their order history and total spend. Search by name or phone, and open a profile to edit their details.

sections.heading: Inventory
sections.body: View all products. Once logged in, you can also add new products, assign a barcode, and edit the price or stock of existing ones.

sections.heading: Cash Management
sections.body: Log cash in and out, and see net position and total revenue by day, week, month, or year. Click the "Cash in" or "Cash out" card to filter the entries below it; click "Total revenue" to jump to Orders.

sections.heading: Carcass Dismantling
sections.body: Record a carcass breakdown against a template: enter the carcass weight, the actual weight of each cut, and where it should be stocked. See the yield and waste compared to the expected numbers.

sections.heading: Login
sections.body: Sign in with your email and password to create orders or manage inventory. Logged-out visitors can still view orders, inventory, and the dashboard. Forgot your password? Use the "Forgot password?" link on the sign-in page to get a reset link by email.

sections.heading: User Management
sections.body: Admins can invite new team members from Admin → Manage Users by email and role — there's no public sign-up. The invited person gets an emailed link to set their own password; if email isn't configured yet, copy the link shown after sending the invite and share it directly.

sections.heading: Language
sections.body: Use the EN/AR button in the top bar to switch the interface language at any time.

dashboard_page.stale_orders_notification: {{count}} order(s) waiting longer than the alert threshold
dashboard_page.subtitle: Today's activity, stock alerts and revenue at a glance.
dashboard_page.late_orders_threshold: Over {{count}} min in the same status

orders_page.please_login: Please log in to view orders.
orders_page.scan_receipt_hint: Scan or type the code printed on this order's receipt to confirm payment and mark it completed.
orders_page.subtitle: Track every order through the shop, from created to completed.
orders_page.confirm_delete_draft: Delete this draft permanently? It was never confirmed, so no stock or cash is affected.
orders_page.error_draft_needs_item: A draft needs at least one item.

new_order_page.title: New Order
new_order_page.error_pick_product: Pick a product and enter a valid kg amount.
new_order_page.error_add_item: Add at least one item to the order.
new_order_page.barcode_placeholder: Scan or type a barcode, then Enter

inventory_page.reason_placeholder: Reason for stock change (restock, correction, shrinkage…)
inventory_page.error_reason_required: A reason is required when changing stock.

login_page.title: Sign in
login_page.subtitle: Sign in to your shop's account.
login_page.invite_only: No account? Your shop's admin creates it and sends you an invite.

forgot_password_page.title: Reset your password
forgot_password_page.submitted_message: If that email has an account, we've sent a link to reset the password.

set_password_page.title: Set your password
set_password_page.invalid_link: This link is invalid or has expired.
set_password_page.success: Your password has been set. You can now sign in.
set_password_page.error_too_short: Password must be at least {{count}} characters.

dismantle_page.subtitle: Record a carcass breakdown against a template and see the yield variance.
dismantle_page.no_access: You don't have permission to record dismantle events.
dismantle_page.error_no_outputs: Enter at least one cut's actual weight.
dismantle_page.confirm_delete_event: Delete this breakdown? Any stock it added will be reversed. This can't be undone.

settings_page.subtitle: Shop-wide alerts, stock, and email preferences
settings_page.no_access: You don't have access to shop settings.
settings_page.error_minutes: Enter a pending-order alert threshold greater than 0.
settings_page.error_threshold: Enter a low-stock threshold greater than 0.
settings_page.pending_order_minutes_hint: How long a draft order can sit unconfirmed before it's flagged as stale on the dashboard.
settings_page.alert_sound_label: Play a sound for new alerts
settings_page.low_stock_threshold_hint: Used for any product without its own threshold set in Inventory.
settings_page.sender_name_hint: Shown as the "From" name on invite and password-reset emails, e.g. "Butcher Cashier <you@yourshop.com>".
settings_page.brevo_sender_hint: The verified sender address in your Brevo account. Add and verify it at app.brevo.com under Senders, Domains & Dedicated IPs.
settings_page.brevo_api_key_hint_configured: A key is already saved. Type a new one and click Update to replace it, or leave this blank — Update won't clear it.
settings_page.brevo_api_key_hint_unconfigured: From app.brevo.com under SMTP & API → API Keys. Free tier covers 300 emails/day.

receipt.title: Receipt
receipt.hint: Controls how the printed receipt looks. Changes apply to the next receipt printed.

settings_page.delivery_name_hint: What your shop calls whoever takes an order out — Driver, Courier, Delivery. Shown on the order board and in order details, never printed on the receipt.

logo.app_hint: Shown in the navigation rail. Leave empty to use the default mark.
logo.receipt_hint: Printed at the top of the receipt. A high-contrast image works best on a thermal printer.
logo.uploaded_placeholder: Uploaded image — remove it to paste a URL instead
logo.too_large: Image is still over {{kb}} KB after resizing. Try a simpler or smaller image.
logo.unreadable: That file couldn't be read as an image.
logo.file_too_large: File is over {{mb}} MB. Pick a smaller one.
logo.too_small: Image is smaller than {{px}}×{{px}} px — it would look blurry.
logo.limits: PNG, JPG, WebP or SVG · up to {{mb}} MB · at least {{px}}px · resized automatically

admin_users_page.title: User Management
admin_users_page.subtitle: Manage roles and permissions
admin_users_page.invite_email_failed: Couldn't send the email to {{email}} — share this link with them directly instead.
admin_users_page.confirm_demote_message: You're changing your own role away from Admin. You'll lose access to this screen until another admin restores it.
admin_users_page.cannot_self: You can't ban or delete your own account.
admin_users_page.reset_link_hint: Generate a password-reset link for this user and email it. The link is also shown here so you can hand it over directly if email doesn't arrive.
admin_users_page.reset_link_sent: Emailed — and here's the link in case it doesn't arrive:
admin_users_page.reset_link_not_sent: The email didn't send. Share this link with them directly:
admin_users_page.reset_link_expiry: This link expires in 1 hour and replaces any previous one.
admin_users_page.confirm_delete_message: This cannot be undone. Accounts with order, stock or cash history can't be deleted — ban them instead, which blocks sign-in immediately and keeps the audit trail.

customers_page.title: Customers
customers_page.delete_confirm: This permanently erases their record. Are you sure?

inbox_page.title: Order Inbox
inbox_page.parse_hint: Reads the pasted text and adds matching products to the cart automatically — review before saving.
inbox_page.parse_unmatched: Added the matching items. Couldn't confidently match: {{items}} — add those by hand.
inbox_page.parse_no_matches: Couldn't confidently match any items in that message — add them by hand below.

cash_page.title: Cash Management
cash_page.no_access: You don't have permission to view cash management.
cash_page.confirm_close_message: This resets order numbering back to #1 and records a permanent snapshot of orders, revenue, and cash since the last closing. It doesn't affect the cash ledger itself — every entry stays in the table below.

errors.NETWORK: Can't reach the server. Check the connection and try again.
errors.UNAUTHORIZED: You need to sign in to do that.
errors.CREDENTIALS_REQUIRED: Enter both an email and a password.
errors.ACCOUNT_BANNED: This account has been disabled. Contact an administrator.
errors.TOKEN_INVALID_OR_EXPIRED: This link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one.
errors.TOO_MANY_LOGIN_ATTEMPTS: Too many sign-in attempts. Wait a moment and try again.
errors.TOO_MANY_REQUESTS: Too many requests. Wait a moment and try again.
errors.ROLE_REQUIRED: This needs the {{role}} role or higher.
errors.CAP_REQUIRED: You don't have permission for this ({{cap}}).
errors.VALIDATION_FAILED: Some fields aren't filled in correctly.
errors.DISMANTLE_EVENT_NOT_FOUND: That dismantle record no longer exists.
errors.ORDER_NOT_DRAFT_PROMOTE: Only drafts can be confirmed. This order is already confirmed.
errors.ORDER_NOT_DRAFT_EDIT: Only drafts can be edited. This order has already moved stock — cancel it instead.
errors.ORDER_NOT_DRAFT_DELETE: Only drafts can be deleted. Cancel a confirmed order instead.
errors.STATUS_NOT_ALLOWED: This order can't move to that status from here.
errors.INSUFFICIENT_STOCK: Not enough {{name}} in stock. Available: {{available}} kg.
errors.RECEIPT_SCAN_WRONG_STATUS: Only on-the-way orders are confirmed by scanning a receipt.
errors.RECEIPT_CODE_MISMATCH: That code belongs to a different order. Check the receipt.
errors.EMAIL_ALREADY_EXISTS: An account with that email already exists.
errors.LAST_ACTIVE_ADMIN: This is the only active admin — make someone else an admin first.
errors.CANNOT_TARGET_SELF: You can't ban or delete your own account.
errors.USER_HAS_HISTORY: This user has order, stock or cash history that must stay attributable. Ban the account instead.
errors.ENCRYPTION_KEY_MISSING: The server isn't set up to store API keys yet. Ask whoever deploys the app to set SETTINGS_ENCRYPTION_KEY.
errors.SERVER_ERROR: Something went wrong on the server. Try again.
errors.DISMANTLE_OUTPUT_AMBIGUOUS: "{{name}}" links to both an existing product and a new one — pick one.
errors.DISMANTLE_OUTPUT_FOREIGN: That output doesn't belong to this dismantle record.
errors.ORGANIZATION_ARCHIVED: This account has been closed. Contact support.
errors.WRONG_ORGANIZATION: You're signed in to a different shop. Sign out and sign in again on this one.
errors.BILLING_SUSPENDED: This account is read-only while billing is suspended. Contact support.
errors.SUPER_ADMIN_REQUIRED: That's restricted to the operator of this deployment.
errors.SLUG_INVALID: Subdomain must be 3-40 characters of lowercase letters, digits or hyphens, and not a reserved name.
errors.SLUG_IMMUTABLE: A subdomain can't be changed — it's in every bookmark and invite link already sent.
errors.ORGANIZATION_HAS_DATA: This organization has users or trading history. Archive it instead of deleting it.

public.badge: Built for butcher shops · Arabic & English
public.subhead: A cashier system for shops that sell by weight. Take orders from the counter, phone or WhatsApp, watch them move to the customer, and close the day knowing the stock and the till agree.
public.highlight_orders: One board from order taken to order delivered
public.highlight_stock: Stock falls as you sell — to three decimal places
public.highlight_cash: Every cash sale logged the moment it happens
public.cta_note: Accounts are created by your shop's admin — there's no public signup.
public.features_title: Built around how a butcher shop actually runs
public.feature_orders_body: Created, in progress, on the way, in the shop, done. Longest-waiting order at the top of each column, with a clock on every card.
public.feature_weight_body: Products are kept in kilograms to three decimals, priced per kilo. No pretending meat comes in whole units.
public.feature_cash_body: Cash sales post to the ledger automatically. Log what goes in and out by hand, then close the day against a permanent snapshot.
public.feature_dismantle_body: Break a calf, sheep or goat into cuts against a template, and have the resulting stock land in inventory with the yield recorded.
public.feature_receipts_body: Set the roll width, what's printed and your own logo. Every slip carries a barcode that confirms a delivery when it comes back.
public.feature_roles_body: Cashier, manager, admin — or view-only. Permissions are enforced on the server, not just hidden in the screen.
public.step_take_body: At the counter, over the phone, or parsed straight from a WhatsApp message into a draft you confirm.
public.step_track_body: The board shows what's cut, what's out for delivery and how long it's been. Late orders surface on the dashboard by themselves.
public.step_close_body: One snapshot of the day's orders and cash, the order numbers reset, and the ledger stays intact behind it.
public.footer_note: A cashier system for shops that sell by weight

organizations_page.title: Organizations
organizations_page.subtitle: Every shop on this deployment. Super admin only.
organizations_page.no_access: This screen is for the operator of this deployment, not for shop accounts.
organizations_page.slug_hint: 3-40 characters, lowercase letters, digits and hyphens. Can't be changed later.
organizations_page.name: Shop name
organizations_page.admin_email_hint: They'll be invited to set a password. Without this, nobody can sign in to the new shop.
organizations_page.invite_sent: Organization created and the admin invite was emailed.
organizations_page.invite_not_sent: Organization created, but the invite email didn't send. Share this link directly.
organizations_page.search_placeholder: Search by name, subdomain or email…
organizations_page.suspended_note: Suspended: this shop can still read its records but cannot create or change anything.
